reviews.comment:
Muy acotada la mercaderia que ofrecen. Los empleados y el encargado tienen una falsa buena predisposicion. Estabamos con un bebe de 3 meses y nos dejaron bajo la lluvia y en medio del barro ya que no podiamos comer unos sandwich bajo la sombrilla para otros dos niños que venían conmigo. Nunca mas.

(Translated by Google)
The selection of merchandise is very limited. The employees and the manager are insincerely friendly. We were with a 3-month-old baby, and they left us standing in the rain and mud because we couldn't eat sandwiches under the umbrella for the other two children who were with us. Never again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJalptOW1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Me salvó la vida ésta estación, la otra que hay en embalse no tenía nafta.
La atención fue muy cordial.
No pude observar con demasiada atención el lugar ya que fuí específicamente a cargar combustible.
Se aceptan targetas.

(Translated by Google)
This station saved my life; the other one in Embalse was out of gas.
The service was very friendly.
I didn't get a chance to look around too much since I was there specifically to fill up.
They accept credit cards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJOFkzdlBREAE
